name: Monmouth Three Rivers (Wye, Monnow, Trothy)
dog_lead_policy: On lead in town; off-lead on meadows
highlights: Circular walk taking in all three of Monmouth's rivers.
points_of_interest: Monnow Bridge (only fortified river bridge in UK); Monmouth Castle (birthplace of Henry V); Shire Hall
viewpoints: Castle grounds; Chippenham meadow; Vauxhall Fields
picnic_spots: Chippenham Meadow; Vauxhall Fields picnic area
parking_start: Monmouth town centre car parks (Glendower St)
food_drink_nearby: Punch House; Gilpin's Coffee House; Stonemill Rockfield; Savoy Theatre cafe
public_transport: Bus to Monmouth; taxi from Chepstow/Abergavenny
